# Real Time Operation Center

**Summary**: A facility where experts monitor and analyze live data from drilling sites to provide immediate feedback.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022]] discussed the role of RTOC in managing complex drilling operations using human expertise.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022]] Used to manage the complexity of remote or deep drilling operations.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- RTOCs require high-skilled personnel, making automation via AI a necessary evolution. ([[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022, p. 49]])
